chunk:
CHUNK:011/021
When you are alone with Gaba?\u201d I took a breath, opened my mouth to speak, and then stopped, not quite sure what I wanted to say, and not entirely sure that I should. \u201cIt\u2019s okay, honey,\u201d Rachael said. \u201cI\u2019m just yanking your chain.\u201d \u201cYes,\u201d I said, feeling thoroughly yanked, and far more wary of Rachael Silk than I had been before stepping foot into her cabin. Her lair, I thought as I wondered if I shouldn\u2019t leave as quickly as I had come in. Rachael shifted her housecoat as she crossed one long and waxed leg over the other. It was a sensual move, and I\u2019ll admit it was as distracting as I guessed it was supposed to be. But less so than Paniula\u2019s diary, and I allowed a little impatience to creep into my voice as I asked Rachael if there was anything she wanted to tell me. \u201cWhat do you want to know, honey?\u201d \u201cI thought you wanted to tell me about what he did to you?\u201d Rachael laughed and said, \u201cWhat he did to me?\u201d Her hair bounced as she shook her head. \u201cThis is nothing.\u201d She tapped her cheek. \u201cThis is an interlude between wild and passionate lovemaking.\u201d Rachael laughed once more, and I took a sip of coffee. \u201cOh, look at you, Officer. Feeling awkward, are we?\u201d \u201cOutgunned, I think,\u201d I said. \u201cNot so much awkward.\u201d \u201cBut you\u2019ve got all the guns, honey.\u201d Rachael pointed at the holster at my hip, before drawing a long slow arc through the air with her finger to the submachine gun tucked between my ribs and the side of the chair. I put my coffee down on the table between us, just in case I might need both hands. I didn\u2019t fancy the idea of Rachael overpowering me and making her escape with me as her hostage, my own gun pressed to the side of my head. The thought made me laugh, and Rachael frowned, twirling her fingers for me to elaborate. \u201cIt\u2019s an inside joke,\u201d I said. \u201cGo on.\u201d \u201cIf you tried to escape\u2026\u201d \u201cYes?\u201d \u201cWhere would you go?\u201d \u201cI don\u2019t understand,\u201d Rachael said. \u201cAre you offering to help me escape, Petra?\u201d \u201cNo,\u201d I said, quickly, and with emphasis. \u201cBut you\u2019re in Greenland. You and Sean and the others\u2026\u201d \u201cThe others\u2026\u201d Rachael laughed. \u201cYou mean Alex and Ray?\u201d She laughed again and said, \u201cInnocent dupes we picked up to run interference should we get into a bind.\u201d She shook her head. \u201cNo more than that.\u201d \u201cOkay,\u201d I said, filing the information to tell Gaba later. \u201cBut you must have known, Greenland isn\u2019t the easiest place to get around. There are no roads\u2026\u201d \u201cSo we discovered,\u201d Rachael said. \u201cEven getting lost is difficult, unless you\u2019re suitably motivated.\u201d \u201cAh\u2026\u201d Rachael\u2019s eyes widened as she smiled. \u201cSuitably motivated. Now you\u2019re getting warmer, Detective.\u201d \u201cConstable,\u201d I said. \u201cNot a detective.\u201d \u201cNo?\u201d Rachael licked her lips and said, \u201cOne day, perhaps.\u201d \u201cPerhaps,\u201d I said. \u201cBut you were telling me about motivation.\u201d \u201cI was.\u201d Rachael nodded. \u201cAnd would you say that Sean is motivated?\u201d \u201cI would, because he is.\u201d Rachael laughed again and said, \u201cSuitably so.\u201d \u201cAnd was it a mistake? Coming to Greenland?\u201d \u201cI don\u2019t know, Constable. Do you think we made a mistake?\u201d \u201cWhat I think\u2026\u201d I took a breath and then bit my lip as I thought about it. Beyond a passing interest, I hadn\u2019t really given Sean Arnet\u2019s motives to come to Greenland much thought. Greenland really was one of the most unlikely places for a diamond smuggler, or someone on America\u2019s Most Wanted list, to come and hide. Of course, there had been rumours of a French intelligence officer hiding in a settlement in the north of Greenland following the bombing of the Greenpeace ship Rainbow Warrior. But they were just rumours. Given the lack of infrastructure, the tiny population confined to a thin coastline wrapped around a massive island of ice, and the harsh and unforgiving climate, I struggled to imagine Greenland being on anyone\u2019s list of potential places to hide. \u201cDoes that hurt, honey?\u201d \u201cWhat?\u201d I said, as Rachael jogged me out of my thoughts. \u201cThat frown on your forehead,\u201d she said, pointing. \u201cSo intense\u2026\u201d \u201cYes,\u201d I said. \u201cIt often is. But it doesn\u2019t hurt.\u201d \u201cOkay\u2026\u201d Rachael leaned back in her seat and said, \u201cI\u2019ll just have to take your word for it. But just so you know, I don\u2019t believe you.\u201d \u201cYou don\u2019t believe it doesn\u2019t hurt?\u201d I said, frowning a little more. \u201cNo, not that,\u201d Rachael said. \u201cThe other thing.\u201d I shook my head \u2013 still not getting it. \u201cI don\u2019t understand,\u201d I said. \u201cYou\u2019ll have to tell me.\u201d \u201cOkay, I can do that.\u201d Rachael finished her coffee and then leaned forward to place her hands on my knees. \u201cSo, honey,\u201d she said. \u201cI asked you if you were going to help me escape. And you said no.\u201d \u201cThat\u2019s right,\u201d I said. \u201cAnd that is what I don\u2019t believe.\u201d Rachael patted my knees and then tilted her head to one side, light dancing in her eyes as she looked at me. \u201cI think you\u2019re going to help me, Petra. And it\u2019s only fair that I help you in return. Right?\u201d I said nothing. It felt safest. \u201cSo\u2026\u201d Rachael moved her hands to the sides of my knees, moved them a little closer to my thighs, and then pulled back, flashing me a cheeky grin. \u201cHow about we make a deal, okay?\u201d \u201cA deal?\u201d \u201cThat\u2019s right, honey. That\u2019s how this works. We make a deal, and I give you what you want, and you let me go.\u201d \u201cI don\u2019t think\u2026\u201d \u201cShhh,\u201d Rachael said as she moved out of her seat to press her finger against my lips. \u201cDon\u2019t speak,\u201d she said. \u201cJust nod, and we can make a deal. Or\u2026\u201d \u201cOr?\u201d I said, as Rachael withdrew. \u201cOr we can negotiate,\u201d she said, pointing my pistol at me. \u201cOn equal terms, honey,\u201d she said with another lick of her lips. \n 9 Rachael was fast and smooth.
compressed_context:
CTX: CABIN: PETRA ∧ RACHAEL-SILK  
PETRA HESITATES AFTER RACHAEL: "WHEN YOU ARE ALONE WITH GABA?"  
PETRA UNDECIDED TO SPEAK ∧ CONSIDERS LEAVE  
RACHAEL: "IT'S OKAY,HONEY; I'M YANKING YOUR CHAIN"  
PETRA: "YES" ∧ WARINESS↑ TOWARDS RACHAEL-SILK  
RACHAEL SHIFT-HOUSECOAT ∧ CROSS-LEG SENSUAL [DISTRACTION]  
PETRA VOICE=IMPATIENT; "ANYTHING YOU WANT TO TELL ME?"  
RACHAEL: "WHAT HE DID TO ME? THIS IS NOTHING"  
INTERLUDE: WILD∧PASSIONATE-LOVEMAKING  
PETRA SIP-COFFEE  
RACHAEL: "LOOK AT YOU, OFFICER; FEELING AWKWARD?"  
PETRA: "OUTGUNNED, NOT AWKWARD"  
RACHAEL POINTS HOLSTER → SUBMACHINE-GUN  
PETRA SETS-COFFEE-DOWN; PREPARES-HANDS  
PETRA IMAGINES HOSTAGE-SCENARIO  
PETRA LAUGHS; RACHAEL FROWNS; TWIRLS-FINGERS  
PETRA: "INSIDE-JOKE; GO ON"  
RACHAEL: "IF YOU TRIED TO ESCAPE… WHERE WOULD YOU GO?"  
PETRA: "NO OFFER TO HELP YOU ESCAPE"  
RACHAEL: "YOU∧SEAN∧OTHERS IN GREENLAND…"  
RACHAEL: "ALEX∧RAY=INNOCENT-DUPES FOR INTERFERENCE"  
PETRA: "NOTED FOR GABA"  
PETRA: "GREENLAND HAS NO-ROADS"  
RACHAEL: "EVEN GETTING-LOST DIFFICULT UNLESS SUITABLY-MOTIVATED"  
RACHAEL: "NOW YOU'RE GETTING WARMER, DETECTIVE"  
PETRA: "CONSTABLE, NOT DETECTIVE"  
RACHAEL: "ONE-DAY, PERHAPS"  
PETRA: "BUT MOTIVATION"  
RACHAEL: "IS SEAN SUITABLY-MOTIVATED?"  
PETRA: "YES"  
RACHAEL: "SUITABLY-SO"  
PETRA: "MISTAKE COMING TO GREENLAND?"  
RACHAEL: "DON'T KNOW; YOU THINK MISTAKE?"  
PETRA THINKS ABOUT SEAN-ARNET MOTIVES; GREENLAND UNLIKELY-HIDEOUT  
RACHAEL: "DOES THAT FROWN HURT?"  
PETRA: "INTENSE FROWN; NO PAIN"  
RACHAEL: "I DON'T BELIEVE YOU"  
PETRA: "BELIEVE WHAT?"  
RACHAEL: "OTHER THING"  
PETRA: "I DON'T UNDERSTAND"  
RACHAEL FINISHES-COFFEE; HANDS ON PETRA-KNEES  
RACHAEL: "YOU SAID NO HELP ESCAPE"  
PETRA: "RIGHT"  
RACHAEL: "THAT'S WHAT I DON'T BELIEVE"  
RACHAEL PATS-KNEES; CHEEKY-GRIN  
RACHAEL: "YOU WILL HELP ME; I WILL HELP YOU. DEAL?"  
PETRA SILENCE  
RACHAEL: "SHHH; NOD FOR DEAL"  
PETRA: "OR?"  
RACHAEL: "WE CAN NEGOTIATE ON EQUAL-TERMS" [POINTS PISTOL]  
RACHAEL MOTION=FAST∧SMOOTH
